chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِرَاءِ وَ الْخُصُومَةِ وَ مُعَادَاةِ الرِّجَالِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 120 – The quarreling, and the disputing, and the animosity to the men

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/139)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/139)
text: إِيَّاكُمْ وَ الْخُصُومَةَ فَإِنَّهَا تَشْغَلُ الْقَلْبَ وَ تُورِثُ النِّفَاقَ وَ تَكْسِبُ الضَّغَائِنَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Anbasa Al Aabid,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Beware of the disputes, for these tend to occupy the heart and inherit the hypocrisy and earn the grudges’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from ibn Mahbub from ‘Anbasah al-‘Abid from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Beware of quarreling; it occupies the heart, causes hypocrisy and brings in hatred.”
